mapper.insert: insert into resume (rno, mid, address, univ, major, career, experi, intro) values (seq_resume.nextVal, #{mid}, #{address}, #{univ}, #{major}, #{career}, #{experi}, #{intro})
mapper.update: update resume set address = #{address}, univ = #{univ}, major = #{major}, career = #{career}, experi = #{experi}, intro = #{intro} where rno = #{rno}
mapper.select: select c.cname, j.deadline from job j join company c on j.cid = c.cid join resume r on j.jno = r.jno where r.mid = #{mid}
